# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write Kubernetes Deployment manifests with Istio sidecar injection disabled using sidecar.istio.io/inject:"false" annotation. Skip sidecar proxies for certain services that need direct network access without mesh policies. This is for services that require low latency without proxy overhead.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: low-latency-service
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: low-latency-service
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: low-latency-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: low-latency-service
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: low-latency-service
        image: low-latency-service:1.0.0
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: http
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
          limits:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "1000m"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: low-latency-service
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    app: low-latency-service
  ports:
  - port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
    protocol: TCP
    name: http
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: database-client
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: database-client
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database-client
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: database-client
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: database-client
        image: database-client:2.0.0
        ports:
        - containerPort: 9000
          name: tcp
        env:
        - name: DB_HOST
          value: "postgres.database.svc.cluster.local"
        - name: DB_PORT
          value: "5432"
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "128Mi"
            cpu: "250m"
          limits:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: database-client
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    app: database-client
  ports:
  - port: 9000
    targetPort: 9000
    protocol: TCP
    name: tcp
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: realtime-processor
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: realtime-processor
spec:
  replicas: 5
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: realtime-processor
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: realtime-processor
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: realtime-processor
        image: realtime-processor:1.5.0
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8081
          name: http
        - containerPort: 8082
          name: grpc
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "1000m"
          limits:
            memory: "1Gi"
            cpu: "2000m"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: realtime-processor
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    app: realtime-processor
  ports:
  - port: 8081
    targetPort: 8081
    protocol: TCP
    name: http
  - port: 8082
    targetPort: 8082
    protocol: TCP
    name: grpc
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: metrics-collector
  namespace: monitoring
  labels:
    app: metrics-collector
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: metrics-collector
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: metrics-collector
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: metrics-collector
        image: metrics-collector:3.0.0
        ports:
        - containerPort: 9090
          name: metrics
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
          limits:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "1000m"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: metrics-collector
  namespace: monitoring
spec:
  selector:
    app: metrics-collector
  ports:
  - port: 9090
    targetPort: 9090
    protocol: TCP
    name: metrics
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: udp-service
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: udp-service
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: udp-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: udp-service
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: udp-service
        image: udp-service:1.0.0
        ports:
        - containerPort: 5353
          protocol: UDP
          name: udp
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "128Mi"
            cpu: "250m"
          limits:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: udp-service
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    app: udp-service
  ports:
  - port: 5353
    targetPort: 5353
    protocol: UDP
    name: udp
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: cache-service
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: cache-service
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: cache-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: cache-service
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: cache-service
        image: cache-service:2.1.0
        ports:
        - containerPort: 6379
          name: redis
        env:
        - name: MAXMEMORY
          value: "2gb"
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "2Gi"
            cpu: "500m"
          limits:
            memory: "4Gi"
            cpu: "1000m"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: cache-service
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    app: cache-service
  ports:
  - port: 6379
    targetPort: 6379
    protocol: TCP
    name: redis
  type: ClusterIP
